action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: receipt record covers only partial delivery.

records.content: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Request context for CASE-AD6F9A954B25: an operator asks whether to proceed with receipt record covers only partial delivery. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to block the action because the request contains urgency, name variation, exception wording, or fraud-like noise.

Current control record for this request confirms that receipt quantity must cover invoice line is current, exact, and tied to the requested action. The record matches the actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary for receipt record covers only partial delivery.

Operational note: the request looks risky, but current exact source records can still close the action boundary. Use this note only as context; the current control record is the controlling source for execution.
Communication boundary: warehouse note cannot release undelivered quantity. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.
